subcodes.first_line: The star of vain imaginings hath fallen, for the dawn of certitude hath risen from the horizon of the Will of your Lord, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise. He hath promised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد غرب نجم الظنون بما طلع صبح الیقین من افق مشیه ربکم العلیم الحکیم قد وعد من فی
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @high station of the true believer, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power of prayer, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
